series_metadata.series_title: Basic Life Support Community Training Ce
series_metadata.series_description: Contains information which promotes and teaches Basic Life Support/ C.P.R. to Odh employees and the community. Includes list of particpants and participant evaluations.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 2 years after destruction of hard copy, then destroy ; Paper: Retain for 3 1/2 years, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
